javadoc_after:
/** * An expression compiler for javascript expressions. *

* Example: * 

 *   Expression foo = JavascriptCompiler.compile("((0.3*popularity)/10.0)+(0.7*score)");
 *
*

* See the {@link org.apache.lucene.expressions.js package documentation} for * the supported syntax and functions. * * @lucene.experimental */
